mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follow (user_id, target_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE target_id = #{targetId}
